description_long: This object is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a dark brown wooden exterior with a slightly angled front face. The upper section houses a green-tinted display screen, bordered by a deep bezel, with pixelated graphics reminiscent of retro video games. Below the screen is a control panel equipped with a single joystick and several colored buttons, arranged in a simple, functional layout. The lower front panel includes a rectangular access door, likely for maintenance or coin collection, and the cabinet stands on a broad, stable base. The side panels are plain and unadorned, with a stepped design at the top that adds a vintage aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, heavy object typical of arcade machines found in public entertainment spaces.
description: A vintage-style upright arcade game cabinet with a green screen, joystick, colored buttons, and a dark brown wooden exterior. The cabinet features a stepped top and plain side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green display screen, joystick, colored buttons, and lower access door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the stepped top profile and plain, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, featureless back panel of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same stepped top and plain side panel.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a thick bezel and green-tinted display
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single joystick with four buttons (gray, red, and black) arranged in a row, single-player layout, no visible markings
